subsidyType: cost-share reimbursement path for eligible lead service line replacement after city verification and contractor work
publicSideCovered: partial the city maintains the utility-owned portion to the meter and verifies eligible work
privateSideCovered: partial eligible lead or suspected lead service line replacements can use the city reimbursement path after contractor completion
propertyRules: homes with lead or suspected lead service lines using the city's verification and reimbursement rules may qualify
contractorRules: homeowners hire a local excavating or plumbing contractor and the city verifies materials permits and reimbursement paperwork
